description: How drone warfare is changing war reporting In the latest episode of Ukraine This Week, Anna Belokur examines why war reporting is becoming more dangerous in Ukraine. With these new dangers, questions have emerged about how best to protect themselves and whether journalists should...

title: Another Russian carrier "Kalibrov" was destroyed, - Zelensky "Major...
title_en: Another Russian carrier "Kalibrov" was destroyed, - Zelensky "Major...

description: Another Russian carrier "Kalibrov" was destroyed, - Zelensky "Major General Yevgeny Khmara reported on the successful defeat of objects in the port of Primorsk. Joint operation of our Security Service of Ukraine, Forces of unmanned systems, SSO, GUR and border guards", - noted the president. He specified that the missile ship "Karakurt" was hit, as well as a patrol boat and another tanker of the shadow oil fleet....
description_en: Another Russian carrier "Kalibrov" was destroyed, - Zelensky "Major General Yevgeny Khmara reported on the successful defeat of objects in the port of Primorsk. Joint operation of our Security Service of Ukraine, Forces of unmanned systems, SSO, GUR and border guards", - noted the president. He specified that the missile ship "Karakurt" was hit, as well as a patrol boat and another tanker of the shadow oil fleet....
description_uk: Еще один российский носитель "Калибров" уничтожен, - Зеленский "Генерал-майор Евгений Хмара доложил об успешном поражении объектов в порту Приморск. Совместная операция нашей Службы безопасности Украины, Сил беспилотных систем, ССО, ГУР и пограничников", - отметил президент. Он уточнил, что поражен ракетный корабль "Каракурт", а также сторожевой катер и еще один танкер теневого нефтяного флота....

title: Drone attack on residential area
title_en: Drone attack on residential area
description: After a long break, Russia used one of its decoy drones. As Flash reported, residents of the Kyiv region noticed unusual drones during yesterday's air attack. "The adversary, after a long break, used the Parody UAV simulators en masse. It was him that the residents saw. The task of such UAVs is to distract the attention of our anti-aircraft defense, so dozens of such UAVs were circling over...
description_en: After a long break, Russia used one of its decoy drones. As Flash reported, residents of the Kyiv region noticed unusual drones during yesterday's air attack. "The adversary, after a long break, used the Parody UAV simulators en masse. It was him that the residents saw. The task of such UAVs is to distract the attention of our anti-aircraft defense, so dozens of such UAVs were circling over...
description_uk: россия после длительного перерыва применила один из своих дронов-обманок Как сообщил Флэш, необычные дроны заметили жители Киевской области во время вчерашней воздушной атаки. "Противник, после длительного перерыва массово применил БпЛА-имитаторы "Пародия". Именно его и видели жители. Задача такого БпЛА – отвлекать внимание нашей противовоздушной обороны, поэтому десятки таких БпЛА кружили над...

title: Kherson: Evacuation ordered
title_en: Kherson: Evacuation ordered
description: The exhibition project "Returning the memory of Kherson" was opened in the walls of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine. Stolen art preserved in museum art prints. Kherson collection. In the fall of 2022, Russia removed more than 10,000 works from the Kherson Art Museum named after Oleksiy Shovkunenko, including works by Aivazovsky, Vasylkivsky, Pymonenko, Sudkovsky, icon painting, landscapes, portraits. It was called "evacuation"....
description_en: The exhibition project "Returning the memory of Kherson" was opened in the walls of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine. Stolen art preserved in museum art prints. Kherson collection. In the fall of 2022, Russia removed more than 10,000 works from the Kherson Art Museum named after Oleksiy Shovkunenko, including works by Aivazovsky, Vasylkivsky, Pymonenko, Sudkovsky, icon painting, landscapes, portraits. It was called "evacuation"....
description_uk: У стінах МЗС України відкрився виставковий проєкт "Повернення пам'яті Херсона". Викрадене мистецтво, збережене в музейних артпринтах. Херсонська колекція. Восени 2022 року Росія вивезла з Херсонського художнього музею імені Олексія Шовкуненка понад 10 тисяч творів, зокрема праці Айвазовського, Васильківського, Пимоненка, Судковського, іконопис, пейзажі, портрети. Це назвали "евакуацією"....

title: They thinned out pe-ve-o🔥 "Birds of Magyar" destroyed 38 units of...
title_en: They thinned out pe-ve-o🔥 "Birds of Magyar" destroyed 38 units of...
description: They thinned out pe-ve-o🔥 "Birds of Magyar" destroyed 38 units of Russian air defense in April. For May 1–2, there are 4 more. The list includes "Bukis", "Tors", "Pantsyri", "Wasps", as well as a key radar, including elements of the S-400. They not only thinned out the equipment - they removed the "eyes" and "shield" of the occupier. And then - everything that flies, arrives more precisely
description_en: They thinned out pe-ve-o🔥 "Birds of Magyar" destroyed 38 units of Russian air defense in April. For May 1–2, there are 4 more. The list includes "Bukis", "Tors", "Pantsyri", "Wasps", as well as a key radar, including elements of the S-400. They not only thinned out the equipment - they removed the "eyes" and "shield" of the occupier. And then - everything that flies, arrives more precisely
description_uk: Проредили пэ-вэ-о🔥 "Птахи Мадяра" за апрель уничтожили 38 единиц российской ПВО. За 1–2 мая - ещё 4. В списке - "Буки", "Торы", "Панцири", "Осы", а также ключевые РЛС, включая элементы С-400. Проредили не просто технику - сняли "глаза" и "щит" оккупанта. А дальше - всё, что летит, прилетает точнее👌

title: Air defense active
title_en: Air defense active
description: 40% of targets are shot down by interceptor drones Defense Forces use interceptor drones to destroy about 40% of all aerial targets. With the improvement of weather conditions, this statistic will grow, said the deputy commander of direct air defense forces of the Air Force, Yury Cherevashenko. "Last year, the rate of participation of interceptors was somewhat higher. Now this statistic is again...
description_en: 40% of targets are shot down by interceptor drones Defense Forces use interceptor drones to destroy about 40% of all aerial targets. With the improvement of weather conditions, this statistic will grow, said the deputy commander of direct air defense forces of the Air Force, Yury Cherevashenko. "Last year, the rate of participation of interceptors was somewhat higher. Now this statistic is again...
description_uk: 40% целей сбивают дроны-перехватчики Силы обороны с помощью дронов-перехватчиков уничтожают около 40 % всех воздушных целей. С улучшением погодных условий эта статистика будет расти, сообщил заместитель командующего силами непосредственного противовоздушного прикрытия Воздушных сил Юрий Черевашенко. "В прошлом году доля участия перехватчиков была несколько выше. Сейчас эта статистика снова...

title: Strike confirmed
title_en: Strike confirmed
description: Rashists hit a gas station in the Dnipropetrovsk region, - OVA A 10-year-old boy was wounded. Ego was hospitalized in a condition of moderate severity. Five adults were also admitted to the hospital. Among them is a 21-year-old pregnant woman. The truck caught fire at the point of impact. The bus, in which there were about 40 children, was also damaged - at the time of arrival, they managed to leave the cabin. Another "military object" according to...
description_en: Rashists hit a gas station in the Dnipropetrovsk region, - OVA A 10-year-old boy was wounded. Ego was hospitalized in a condition of moderate severity. Five adults were also admitted to the hospital. Among them is a 21-year-old pregnant woman. The truck caught fire at the point of impact. The bus, in which there were about 40 children, was also damaged - at the time of arrival, they managed to leave the cabin. Another "military object" according to...
description_uk: Рашисты ударили по АЗС в Днепропетровской области, - ОВА Ранен 10-летний мальчик. Его госпитализировали в состоянии средней тяжести. В больницу также поступили пять взрослых. Среди них - 21-летняя беременная женщина. На месте удара загорелся грузовик. Также поврежден автобус, в котором находились около 40 детей - на момент прилета они успели покинуть салон. Очередной "военный объект" по версии...

description: 249 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED ➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖ On the night of May 3 (from 19:00 on May 2), the enemy attacked with an Iskander-M ballistic missile from the Kursk region. - Russian Federation, 268 strike UAVs of the Shahed type (including jet ones), Gerbera, Italmas and other types of drones from the directions: Kursk, Shatalovo, Orel, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russian Federation, TOT Gvardiyske, Chauda - TOT AR Crimea, TOT Donetsk, more than 160 of them are "shahedy"....
description_en: 249 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED ➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖ On the night of May 3 (from 19:00 on May 2), the enemy attacked with an Iskander-M ballistic missile from the Kursk region. - Russian Federation, 268 strike UAVs of the Shahed type (including jet ones), Gerbera, Italmas and other types of drones from the directions: Kursk, Shatalovo, Orel, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russian Federation, TOT Gvardiyske, Chauda - TOT AR Crimea, TOT Donetsk, more than 160 of them are "shahedy"....
